purpose: Current production bundle debt ceiling. The clean, commit-SHA-attributed I-25 admin-override accessibility and stale-response artifact adds 5,043 raw / 1,644 gzip JavaScript bytes and 998 raw bytes to the largest chunk versus the I-24 Windows artifact. The total ceilings move by those measured deltas so the existing 128-byte raw and 279-byte gzip cross-platform/SHA allowances remain unchanged. Largest JavaScript raw stays exact; largest JavaScript gzip and both CSS ceilings retain their existing values. Further increases require an explicit reviewed baseline update.
